'''jakada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cable|cable]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-k-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cable|cable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jakada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jækædæth|jækædæth]] || [[word:jækædæj|jækædæj]] || [[word:jækædæsh|jækædæsh]] || [[word:jækædæ|jækædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jakakadath|jakakadath]] || [[word:jakakadaj|jakakadaj]] || [[word:jakakadash|jakakadash]] || [[word:jakakada|jakakada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jakadath|jakadath]] || [[word:jakadaj|jakadaj]] || [[word:jakadash|jakadash]] || [[word:jakada|jakada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jakafdath|jakafdath]] || [[word:jakafdaj|jakafdaj]] || [[word:jakafdash|jakafdash]] || [[word:jakafdaf|jakafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jakadatha|jakadatha]] || [[word:jakadaja|jakadaja]] || [[word:jakadasha|jakadasha]] || [[word:jakadaka|jakadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jakadath|jakadath]] || [[word:jakadaj|jakadaj]] || [[word:jakadash|jakadash]] || [[word:jakada|jakada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jakadathal|jakadathal]] || [[word:jakadajal|jakadajal]] || [[word:jakadashal|jakadashal]] || [[word:jakadakal|jakadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jakadathatha|jakadathatha]] || [[word:jakadajaja|jakadajaja]] || [[word:jakadashasha|jakadashasha]] || [[word:jakadaka|jakadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jakadathan|jakadathan]] || [[word:jakadajan|jakadajan]] || [[word:jakadashan|jakadashan]] || [[word:jakadakan|jakadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jakadathaoro|jakadathaoro]] || [[word:jakadajaoro|jakadajaoro]] || [[word:jakadashaoro|jakadashaoro]] || [[word:jakadakaoro|jakadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
